zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Carew於大約1368年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Sir Leonard Carew28歲，母親Elizabeth Arundel19歲。他於1390年與Lady Elizabeth Bonville在英國薩默塞特修頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1431年1月25日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特修頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Carew于大约1368年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Sir Leonard Carew28岁，母亲Elizabeth Arundel19岁。他于1390年与Lady Elizabeth Bonville在英国薩默塞特修頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1431年1月25日在英国英格兰薩默塞特修頓享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Carew was born about 1368, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Leonard Carew, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Arundel, was 19. He married Lady Elizabeth Bonville in 1390, in Chewton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 January 1431, in Chewton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Carew est né environ 1368, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Leonard Carew, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Arundel, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Bonville en 1390, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1431, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Bonville nel 1390, nel Chewton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Carewが約1368年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Leonard Carewは28歳，母Elizabeth Arundelは19歳であった。1390年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンでLady Elizabeth Bonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1431年1月25日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチェウトンで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーベッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Ottery by Tavistock, Devon, England, Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 비 타비스톡
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Carew(이)가 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Leonard Carew(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Arundel(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 Lady Elizabeth Bonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 체w턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 베딩턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Bonville em 1390, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Carew родился около 1368 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Leonard Carew было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Arundel, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Bonville в 1390 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1431 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Bonville en 1390, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1431, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
